metadata.description: A woman in her 40s-50s with deep brown skin and a smooth texture, exhibiting a few small freckles on her cheeks and forehead. Her face is an oval shape with a gently rounded jawline. She has short, tightly curled black hair, styled close to the head with a natural hairline. Her eyes are almond-shaped and widely set, with striking amber irises. Her eyebrows are medium thickness and naturally arched. Her nose has a broad bridge and a rounded tip. Her lips are medium thickness, with a well-defined cupid's bow. She has subtle smile lines around her eyes and mouth, and her head is angled slightly to the left with a gentle, closed-mouth smile.
